name: test_spec_selectsuccess2
statusMessage: ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: ''
statusTrace:
self = <test_aps.test_resourcegroup.TestResourceGroup object at 0x0000022BDD17F100>, config = <config.settings.Settings object at 0x0000022BDCF7B520>

    @allure.story("查询资源组名称包含A并且显示顺序>0")
    def test_spec_selectsuccess2(self, config):
        self.item.click_toolbar_button('查询')
        self.item.query_double_click_field_cell(1)
        self.item.query_pick_option("资源组名称")
        self.item.query_click_cell(1, 3)
        self.item.query_pick_option("(")
        self.item.query_open_operator_dropdown(1)
        self.item.query_pick_option("包含")
        self.item.query_fill_value_cell(1, "A")
        self.item.query_click_cell(1, 7)
        self.item.query_pick_option(")")
    
        self.item.query_double_click_field_cell(2)
        self.item.query_click_logical_op("and", row=2)
    
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 3)
        self.item.query_pick_option("(")
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 4)
        self.item.query_pick_option("显示顺序")
        self.item.query_open_operator_dropdown(2)
        self.item.query_pick_option(">")
        self.item.query_fill_value_cell(2, "0")
        self.item.query_click_cell(2, 7)
        self.item.query_pick_option(")")
    
        self.item.click_layout_confirm_button('确定')
        self.item.wait_table_loading()
        specname = self.item.get_table_column_values(3)
        speccode = self.item.get_table_column_values(9)
        self.item.right_refresh('资源组')
        assert len(specname) > 0 and len(speccode) > 0
>       assert all(int(code) > 0 for code in speccode) and all("A" in name for name in specname)
